target: 7. Two Shadows
N-n-n-nani ya kono oto…!?
Shi, koe o chiisaku shite kudasai!

Aaa, ano oto… inu ya neko toka nai na.
Motto ookina…

Moshikashitara, kage no Mio mo.
Sore de nakereba…

Shi, Shinpei-kun… iya,
Ooo, ore no nisemono kamo nai tte wake ka.
Ee, sou iu koto ni naru.

Kakak, kage domo me… moshi ore no me no mae ni
arawareyo tara, sozo, sono toki… sono toki!
Totsumura-san?

Sono toki, sono toki,
Kono kenjuu de, kono kenjuu de…
Totsumura-san, chikaraite kudasai.
O, o, chikaraite ru wa i.
Sou wa miete――
Totsumura-san, kimasu…!
…tsu!?

Sono hen ni kakureteru n ya?
Dete kite yo-.
Kiyotta…!

Oii, ano Mio-chan no nisemono,
Hakoya motteru zo…!

(Kage no Mio…
Kao ya sugata dake ja naku,
Koe made Mio sono mono da…)

(Koko de heta toshi,
Mata kubi o sasareta toki mitai ni…)

(No… I can't let fear get to me!
Bird's-eye view—I've gotta take a bird's-eye view!)
A, Akan… kiyanna…!
Kocchi kiyanna tte…!

Mite~tsuketa!
Soko ni ottan ka?
(Shimatta…!)

Shin-chan ni chotto kikinai koto
ann ya kedo…

Ko, kono bakenmon…!

To, Totsumura-san…!?
(Taorete… ugokanai)
(Yatta… no ka?)
Mio no koto… mamoru chatte ne…
(Shizukae, are wa Mio ja nai…)

(Are wa kage no Mio…
Oretachi o koroshi ni kita nda…!)

Moo~.
Fuiuchi toka, zuru iwa.
…epp?

A, Aho na…!
Tashika ni atatta hazu ya!

Mune no do makana ya zo!?
Se ya no… konnan ari en nai!!

Urusai naa.
Ja, kondo wa kocchi no ban.
Shinpei-kun!! ?

Haya yann toite yo, Shin-chan.
Ato mo uchi tatta no ni.

(Na, nanda, ima no ugoki…!?
Ningen no hayasa ja nai!)
(Sou mo kenjuu de uattara shina nai nante…)

(Kono yatsu aite ni tatakatte…
Hontou ni kateru no ka!?)
Mo, mou Akan…!

Taikyaku ya…!
Ichiji tetta ya de, Shinpei-kun!
Totsumura-san…!?

A~a.
Tetsu-san, jibun dake nige te shimata.

Maa, eek.
Chanto soko no bouki mo shi to ita shi.

Na, nani ya omae…!
Ore sojiki ya nke!?

Tte… epp?
Masaka ore no nisemono?
Waaa! !!
Totsumura-san!!
(Kakimiguchi sarete ita no ka…!)

Sou iu koto ya kara,
Shin-chan mo kankan shite kotaete ya.

Watashi no koto dowa de toratta ryou ya n.
Demo, naze watashi no koto…
Watashi ga kuru koto shitteta n?
(Dowa no koto… barete ru!?)

(Moshikashitara… Koba Mart de tsukurareta
Ore no kopii kara kiita no ka?)

(Sou doreba… kage wa hoka ni ite,
Kage douji renkei o toteru kanousei ga…)
Kuso…
Kotaeru ki i nai mite yane.

A~a, Shin-chan hongo no kuchi kara
kikitakun da kedo naa.

(To, tonikaku ima wa,
Kono joukyou o norikikanai to…)

Naze konna koto o suru…?
Mokuteki wa nan da!?
Sore kiite dou suru n?

Kocchi no shitsumon ni kotaete kure.
Chanto kotaete kure tara kocchi mo――

Aa, muri muri.
Tatoe Shin-chan de mo sore wa ienai yo.

Gomen na.
Kicchiri koroshicharu kara,
Sore de kanben shite ya.

Omae wa… zettai ni Mio ja nai!
Mio ga sonna koto, zettai ni iu wake ga nai!

Shinpei-kun, erai koccha!
A, achi ni ore no nisemono ga…!
Totsumura-san…!?
Are? Mada shinde hen katta n?
Kora kora, nige tara Akan ya nke.

Shi tte.
Otona shiyou kanen seee.
…kuu!! !
(Koitsu ga kage no Totsumura…)
(Futari no kage ni hasamarete… nigeba ga nai)

Hona, koko ra de owari ni shiyo ka.
Mada mada yaranakya Akan koto ga
yooku aru sake yo.

Honto ya ne.
Tetsu-san, kono ato oomawashii ya.

Se ya de.
Honrin kara mata keiji ga kuru ryou na kara na.

Zenpen kita renchuu mitai ni
Hayai toko shimatsu shi toka Akan jyo.

Shi, shimatsu tte…
Masaka o ran naku natta keiji ra wa,
Omae ga! ?
Se ya de.

Zouen no shimatsu ga owatta ato,
Tsugi wa soitsu ga fukudai shita ore ra no yume o
kesu de mawarana Akan ne n.
Honto yaru koto oto de kanwan wa a.
Omae… so, sonna koto made!

Omae no kawari wa,
Kono ore ga cha~n to tsutomeru.
Se ya sake, anshin shite shi.
Ko, kono bakenmon ga…!

(Mada da…
Mada nanika suru koto ga aru hazu…)
(Mou kashite minna o tasukeru nda!)
Jibun ga gō ni natte Totsumura o nige masu
Nan to mo Totsumura o tsurete nigeru

(Moshi ore ga korosarete mo,
Mata yarinaoseru chansu ga aru kamo nai)
(Demo Totsumura-san wa…)

(Sou dakedo ima wa ore ga gō ni natte mo,
Totsumura-san o nige masu shika nai!)
Shinpei-kun, douni shite ee?

Dekitara, ore,
Mada shini tainai n ya kedo naa…

Daijoubu desu, Totsumura-san.
Ore ni makasete kudasai…!

(Sono tame ni mo,
Koko wa dounika shite Totsumura-san o tsurete
nige kuru shika nai!)
Moshikashitara ore ra, kono mama…

Mada akirame naide kudasai!
Kibun ni wa futari de ikite kaerimashō.
Shinpei-kun…

Dakara, shikkari shite kudasai.
Totsumura-san wa seigi no aibou n desu yo ne?
A, aa…
